nl_query: Which scripts have been through more than one evaluation cycle and have at least one result history correction, showing the script URN, number of cycles, number of corrections, and the latest final marks.
failed_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.urn, COUNT(DISTINCT b.id) AS num_boards, COUNT(DISTINCT rh.id) AS num_corrections, MAX(r.final_marks) AS latest_final_marks
FROM   answer_script s
JOIN   script_assignment sa ON sa.script_id = s.id AND sa.is_active = TRUE
JOIN   evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.assignment_id = sa.id AND ea.is_active = TRUE
JOIN   result r ON r.script_id = s.id
JOIN   result_history rh ON rh.result_id = r.id
WHERE  s.lifecycle_status = 'ATTEMPTED'
  AND s.scan_status = 'SCANNED'
  AND s.evaluation_status IN ('NOT_ASSIGNED', 'ASSIGNED', 'IN_PROGRESS')
  AND s.block_status IN ('NONE', 'MALPRACTICE')
GROUP BY s.urn
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT b.id) > 1
  AND COUNT(DISTINCT rh.id) > 0
ORDER BY num_boards DESC, latest_final_marks DESC
LIMIT 200;
error: Validation failed (schema): Ambiguous column reference: 'id'. It exists in multiple tables (script_assignment, evaluation_attempt, answer_script, result_history, result). You must qualify it with a table alias.
